## HPE insider sells shares worth approximately $1.1M per SEC filing

Routine insider liquidity transaction; no read-through for HPE's fundamentals or strategic direction.

- An HPE insider sold shares valued at roughly $1,113,199 per a recent SEC disclosure.
- Routine Form 4 filing; no strategic, operational, or guidance context attached.
- No product, earnings, or competitive news tied to the transaction.
- Low fundamental signal.
